final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster / PPT cover slide for the launch of 长安起源Q06, an automotive brand reveal, scheduled for September.

Style/medium: photorealistic automotive marketing key visual, sleek and bold editorial design in the spirit of premium Chinese auto brand campaigns
Composition: wide cinematic horizontal layout, hero car centered or slightly offset, title and subtitle text overlaid in the lower third, generous negative space above for visual impact
Subject: 长安起源Q06 as the hero vehicle, rendered with sharp body lines, glossy paint, and commanding presence; brand-aligned headline and subtitle text
Scene/backdrop: dramatic open environment — dark gradient sky breaking into deep blue or midnight teal, suggesting depth and transparency; subtle light rays or volumetric atmosphere to convey a sense of breakthrough and arrival
Lighting/mood: high-contrast dramatic lighting with cool blue-white key light hitting the car body, rim lighting to separate subject from background, awe-inspiring and forward-looking mood
Color palette: deep midnight blue and near-black as base, electric ice-blue or silver as accent on car highlights, warm gold or white for headline text to signal premium brand tone
Materials/textures: mirror-finish car paint with visible reflections, glass-like atmospheric depth in background, subtle metallic sheen on typographic elements
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06" as main headline; "9月上市" as subtitle
Constraints: text must remain legible against the background; layout must work as a 16:9 widescreen PPT cover; brand hierarchy — car name largest, launch date secondary
Avoid: generic stock-photo car backgrounds, lens flare overload, cluttered layout, watermark, cartoon or illustrated style
